dataManagement.title: Import Data
dataManagement.description: Import your financial data from various sources

textSource.title: Import from any Text Source
textSource.description: Parse and import transactions from bank statements, emails, or any text source. Uses AI to automatically extract transaction data.
textSource.button: Import from Text (PDF, CSV, TXT, etc)

csv.title: Import CSV
csv.description: Import transactions from a CSV file. You can map columns, handle duplicates, and create new accounts or categories as needed.

export.cardDescription: Download a zip with your transactions, accounts, budgets, and other data. Useful for spreadsheet analysis, tax prep, or migrating to another budgeting app.

dialog.title: Export your data
dialog.description: Pick a format and the parts of your data you want. The download starts as soon as you confirm.

groups.label: What to include
groups.transactionsDescription: Transactions, accounts, balances history, categories, tags, vehicles
groups.budgetsDescription: Custom budgets with linked categories and spending totals

notifications.success: Export ready – your download should start in a moment.
notifications.failed: Could not export your data. Please try again.
notifications.downloadBlocked: Export ready, but your browser blocked the download. Check the address bar for a download prompt.
notifications.tooLarge: Your data is too large for a single export. Please contact support.

dateRange.label: Date range (optional)
dateRange.helper: Only event tables (transactions, balance history, investment activity) get filtered. Accounts, categories, and other reference tables stay complete.
